attributes.description: Full name of the qualified technician who performed and certified the calibration. Captured as a denormalized field on the calibration certificate for regulatory traceability even if the technician record changes.

attributes.name: tolerance_lower_limit
attributes.description: The minimum acceptable deviation from the reference value for the instrument to be considered in calibration. Expressed in the same unit as measurement_unit. Falling below this limit results in a fail or out-of-tolerance status.
attributes.references: ISO 9001:2015 Clause 7.1.5; ANSI Z540.3; ISO/IEC 17025:2017 Clause 7.6

attributes.name: tolerance_upper_limit
attributes.description: The maximum acceptable deviation from the reference value for the instrument to be considered in calibration. Expressed in the same unit as measurement_unit. Exceeding this limit results in a fail or out-of-tolerance status.
attributes.references: ISO 9001:2015 Clause 7.1.5; ANSI Z540.3; ISO/IEC 17025:2017 Clause 7.6

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this calibration record was last modified. Supports audit trail requirements and change detection in the Databricks Silver Layer ingestion pipeline.

products.name: job_plan_material_requirement
products.description: This association product represents the Material Requirement contract between a job_plan and a spare_part. It captures the structured Bill of Materials (BOM) for a maintenance job plan — defining which spare parts are required, in what quantity, in what sequence, and at what estimated cost, for each job plan execution. Each record links one job_plan to one spare_part with attributes that exist only in the context of this planned material requirement. Replaces the denormalized spare_parts_list STRING on job_plan. Sourced from Maximo Job Plan Materials and SAP PM Task List Components.. Existence Justification: In Maximo and SAP PM, a Job Plan (Task List) explicitly defines a Bill of Materials — a list of spare parts required to execute the maintenance procedure. A single job plan requires multiple spare parts (e.g., filters, seals, lubricants, fasteners), and a single spare part appears in many job plans across different equipment types and maintenance activities. This is a first-class operational relationship that maintenance planners actively create, update, and delete as part of the planning process, carrying its own data (quantity required, sequence, mandatory flag, estimated cost).

attributes.name: job_plan_material_requirement_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Job Plan Material Requirement - Job Plan Material Requirement Id
attributes.description: Primary key for the job_plan_material_requirement association

attributes.name: job_plan_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Job Plan Material Requirement - Job Plan Id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to the parent job plan (task list) that defines this material requirement.

attributes.name: spare_part_id
attributes.business_glossary_term: Job Plan Material Requirement - Spare Part Id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to the spare part (material) required by this job plan.

attributes.name: estimated_cost
attributes.description: Estimated cost of this specific spare part line within the job plan BOM, calculated as quantity_required multiplied by the standard unit cost at planning time. Contributes to the job plan header estimated_material_cost rollup.

attributes.name: estimated_material_cost
attributes.description: Estimated total cost of spare parts and materials required to execute this job plan. Used for maintenance budget planning and procurement forecasting. Expressed in the operational currency. [Moved from job_plan: This is a derived rollup of all job_plan_material_requirement.estimated_cost lines. While a header-level summary may be retained on job_plan for convenience, the source of truth for material cost is the individual requirement lines in this association. The denormalized spare_parts_list STRING (referenced in detection reasoning) must be removed entirely and replaced by this association table.]
attributes.references: Maximo Asset Management - Estimated Material Cost; SAP PM Planned Materials; IFRS/GAAP

attributes.name: is_mandatory
attributes.description: Indicates whether this spare part is mandatory for job plan execution (true) or optional/conditional based on findings during the task (false). Belongs to the requirement relationship.

attributes.name: part_sequence_number
attributes.description: Sequence number defining the order in which this material is staged or consumed within the job plan task steps. Belongs to the requirement relationship, not to either entity alone.

attributes.name: quantity_required
attributes.description: Quantity of this spare part required per single execution of the job plan. Belongs to the requirement relationship, not to the part master or the job plan header.

domains.name: inventory
domains.description: Inventory and warehouse management domain governing raw materials, WIP, finished goods, SKUs, lot/batch tracking, bin locations, cycle counts, stock movements, JIT inventory control, safety stock optimization, and material handling across all facilities. Integrates SAP WM and Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM for real-time stock visibility and MRP-driven replenishment.

products.name: stock_location
products.description: Master record for all physical storage locations within warehouses and facilities, including bin, rack, shelf, zone, and aisle designations. Captures location type (bulk, pick, reserve, staging), capacity constraints, temperature and environmental requirements, and coordinate-based bin addressing. Serves as the single source of truth for all bin-level location data used for real-time stock placement, retrieval, and directed put-away across all manufacturing facilities.
products.reference: SAP WM Storage Bin / WMS Bin Location

attributes.name: stock_location_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the physical storage location within warehouses and facilities. Primary key for the stock location master record.

attributes.name: account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.customer_account. Business justification: Consignment inventory tracking requires linking each stock location to the owning customer account for ownership and billing.

attributes.name: account_site_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.account_site. Business justification: Customer site locations are often mapped to physical stock locations for site‑specific inventory allocation.

attributes.name: warehouse_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent warehouse or facility where this storage location resides. Links to the facility master for site-level aggregation and reporting.
attributes.references: SAP WM (Warehouse Management) - Storage Location Structure

attributes.name: abc_classification
attributes.description: ABC classification of the storage location based on inventory velocity and value. A-class locations store high-velocity or high-value items in the most accessible zones. B-class locations store medium-velocity items. C-class locations store slow-moving items in less accessible areas. Used for warehouse slotting optimization and space allocation.
attributes.references: SAP WM - ABC Analysis, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Slotting Strategy

attributes.name: access_equipment_required
attributes.description: Type of material handling equipment required to access this storage location. Determines labor and equipment resource planning for put-away and picking operations. Influences cycle time calculations and warehouse operational efficiency metrics (OEE). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: none|forklift|reach_truck|order_picker|crane|agv|manual — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: SAP WM - Material Handling Equipment Configuration, OSHA 1910.178 Powered Industrial Trucks

attributes.name: aisle_number
attributes.description: Aisle identifier within the warehouse zone. Aisles are the primary navigation paths for material handlers and automated guided vehicles (AGVs). Used for directed put-away and optimized picking routes.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Bin Coordinate System

attributes.name: bin_position
attributes.description: Horizontal bin position within the shelf level. Represents the finest granularity of storage location addressing. Used for precise material placement and retrieval in high-density storage environments.

attributes.name: capacity_pallet_positions
attributes.description: Number of standard pallet positions that can be stored in this location. Used for pallet storage locations to calculate available capacity and optimize warehouse space utilization. Assumes standard pallet dimensions (e.g., 1200mm x 1000mm EUR pallet or 1219mm x 1016mm North American pallet).
attributes.references: SAP WM - Pallet Storage Configuration, ISO 6780 Flat Pallets for Intercontinental Materials Handling

attributes.name: capacity_volume_m3
attributes.description: Maximum volumetric capacity of the storage location measured in cubic meters. Used for space utilization analysis, slotting optimization, and warehouse capacity planning. Constrains the physical size of materials that can be stored in this location.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Bin Capacity, ISO 3676 Packaging - Volumetric Measurement

attributes.name: capacity_weight_kg
attributes.description: Maximum weight capacity of the storage location measured in kilograms. Enforces structural load limits for racks and shelves. Critical for safety compliance and preventing equipment damage. Used in slotting algorithms to match heavy materials with appropriate locations.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Bin Capacity, OSHA 1910.176 Material Handling and Storage, ISO 45001 Occupational Health and Safety

attributes.name: created_date
attributes.description: Date when this storage location record was initially created in the warehouse management system. Used for master data audit trails, location lifecycle tracking, and warehouse expansion analysis.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Master Data Audit, ISO 9001 Quality Management - Record Control

attributes.name: cycle_count_frequency
attributes.description: Frequency at which this storage location is scheduled for cycle counting inventory verification. High-value or high-velocity locations typically have higher cycle count frequencies. Used to generate cycle count schedules and ensure inventory accuracy per ISO 9001 quality management requirements.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Cycle Counting Configuration, ISO 9001 Quality Management - Inventory Control

attributes.name: deactivation_date
attributes.description: Date when this storage location was deactivated or retired from operational use. Deactivated locations are no longer available for material placement but may retain historical inventory transaction data. Used for warehouse reconfiguration tracking and capacity planning analysis.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Location Lifecycle Management, ISO 9001 Quality Management - Record Retention

attributes.name: fifo_enforced
attributes.business_glossary_term: First In First Out (FIFO) Enforced Flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this location enforces First In First Out (FIFO) inventory rotation. FIFO ensures older materials are consumed before newer materials, critical for perishable goods, time-sensitive components, and materials with shelf-life constraints. Used by warehouse management systems (WMS) to generate FIFO-compliant pick instructions.
attributes.references: SAP WM - FIFO Strategy, ISO 9001 Quality Management - Inventory Rotation

attributes.name: fire_zone
attributes.description: Fire safety zone identifier for this storage location. Fire zones group locations by fire suppression system coverage and emergency response protocols. Critical for safety compliance, emergency planning, and hazardous material segregation per OSHA and NFPA standards.
attributes.references: OSHA 1910.39 Fire Prevention Plans, NFPA 101 Life Safety Code

attributes.name: humidity_controlled
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this location maintains controlled humidity levels. Humidity control is critical for materials susceptible to moisture damage, corrosion, or degradation such as electronics, metal components, and hygroscopic materials.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 Quality Management - Environmental Control, SAP WM - Environmental Requirements

attributes.name: humidity_max_percent
attributes.description: Maximum allowable relative humidity percentage for this storage location. Enforces upper humidity boundary to prevent condensation, corrosion, or mold growth. Typically ranges from 50% to 70% for general storage, lower for electronics.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 Quality Management - Environmental Monitoring, IPC Standards - Electronics Storage

attributes.name: humidity_min_percent
attributes.description: Minimum allowable relative humidity percentage for this storage location. Enforces lower humidity boundary to prevent static electricity buildup or material desiccation. Typically ranges from 20% to 40% for electronics and sensitive components.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 Quality Management - Environmental Monitoring, IPC Standards - Electronics Storage

attributes.name: is_hazmat_approved
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this location is certified and approved for storing hazardous materials. Hazmat-approved locations must meet specific safety, ventilation, containment, and regulatory requirements per OSHA and EPA standards. Used to enforce material placement rules for dangerous goods.
attributes.references: OSHA 1910.1200 Hazard Communication, EPA 40 CFR Part 262 Hazardous Waste Management, SAP WM - Hazmat Storage Configuration

attributes.name: is_picking_location
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this location is designated as a primary picking location for order fulfillment. Picking locations are typically positioned in ergonomic zones with high accessibility and are replenished from reserve locations. Used by warehouse management systems (WMS) to optimize pick path generation.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Picking Area Configuration, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Picking Location

attributes.name: is_replenishment_location
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this location serves as a reserve or bulk storage location that feeds picking locations through replenishment processes. Replenishment locations typically have higher capacity and lower accessibility than picking locations.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Replenishment Strategy, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Replenishment Configuration

attributes.name: last_cycle_count_date
attributes.description: Date when the most recent cycle count was performed for this storage location. Used to track cycle count compliance, identify overdue counts, and calculate inventory accuracy metrics. Critical for maintaining inventory integrity and meeting audit requirements.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Cycle Count History, ISO 9001 Quality Management - Traceability

attributes.name: location_code
attributes.description: Unique alphanumeric code identifying the storage location within the warehouse. Used for barcode scanning, pick lists, and warehouse management system (WMS) transactions. Typically follows a structured format combining zone, aisle, rack, shelf, and bin identifiers.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Bin Addressing, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Location Naming Convention

attributes.name: location_name
attributes.description: Human-readable descriptive name for the storage location. Provides business context beyond the technical location code for reporting and user interfaces.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Location Master Data

attributes.name: location_status
attributes.description: Current operational status of the storage location. Active locations are available for material placement and retrieval. Blocked locations are temporarily unavailable due to quality holds, damage, or operational restrictions. Maintenance status indicates the location is undergoing repair or inspection. Reserved status indicates the location is allocated for specific materials or operations. Full status indicates the location has reached capacity.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Bin Status, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Location Status Management

attributes.name: location_type
attributes.description: Classification of the storage location based on its operational purpose within the warehouse. Bulk locations store large quantities, pick locations support order fulfillment, reserve locations hold overflow inventory, staging areas facilitate material movement, quarantine zones isolate non-conforming materials, and cross-dock areas enable direct transfer without storage. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: bulk|pick|reserve|staging|receiving|shipping|quarantine|rework|scrap|kitting|cross_dock — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Type Configuration, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Location Type

attributes.name: lot_control_required
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether materials stored in this location must be tracked by lot or batch number. Lot control is mandatory for materials subject to traceability requirements, expiration date management, or quality recall procedures per ISO 9001 and industry-specific regulations.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Batch Management, ISO 9001 Quality Management - Traceability, FDA 21 CFR Part 11 (if applicable)

attributes.name: mixed_sku_allowed
attributes.business_glossary_term: Mixed Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) Allowed Flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this location can store multiple different SKUs simultaneously. Single-SKU locations simplify picking and inventory accuracy but reduce space utilization. Mixed-SKU locations increase storage density but require more sophisticated inventory tracking and picking processes.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Strategy Configuration, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Location SKU Policy

attributes.name: modified_date
attributes.description: Date when this storage location record was last modified. Tracks changes to location attributes such as capacity, status, or environmental requirements. Used for change management, audit compliance, and data quality monitoring.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Master Data Audit, ISO 9001 Quality Management - Record Control

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for additional notes, special instructions, or operational comments about this storage location. May include information about structural issues, access restrictions, special handling requirements, or temporary operational changes not captured in structured fields.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Location Master Data, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Location Comments

attributes.name: pick_sequence
attributes.description: Numeric sequence number used to optimize picking routes within the warehouse. Lower numbers indicate locations that should be visited earlier in the pick path. Used by warehouse management systems (WMS) to generate efficient pick lists and minimize travel distance for order fulfillment.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Pick Path Optimization, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Wave Planning

attributes.name: rack_number
attributes.description: Rack or bay identifier within the aisle. Racks are vertical storage structures containing multiple shelf levels. Critical for coordinate-based bin addressing and warehouse layout optimization.

attributes.name: security_level
attributes.description: Security classification level for this storage location. Determines access control requirements, surveillance coverage, and material handling authorization levels. High-security locations store valuable materials, controlled substances, or proprietary components requiring enhanced protection.
attributes.references: ISO 27001 Information Security Management, NIST Cybersecurity Framework - Physical Security

attributes.name: shelf_level
attributes.description: Vertical shelf or tier position within the rack (e.g., 1, 2, 3 or A, B, C). Shelf level determines accessibility, ergonomics, and suitability for different material handling equipment. Lower shelves typically used for high-velocity or heavy items.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Bin Coordinate System

attributes.name: temperature_controlled
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this location is within a temperature-controlled environment. Temperature-controlled locations are required for materials sensitive to heat, cold, or humidity such as chemicals, electronics, pharmaceuticals, and certain raw materials.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 Quality Management - Environmental Control, SAP WM - Temperature Zone Configuration

attributes.name: temperature_max_c
attributes.description: Maximum allowable temperature for this storage location measured in degrees Celsius. Enforces upper temperature boundary for temperature-sensitive materials. Exceeding this threshold may trigger quality alerts and material quarantine procedures.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 Quality Management - Environmental Monitoring, SAP WM - Temperature Requirements

attributes.name: temperature_min_c
attributes.description: Minimum allowable temperature for this storage location measured in degrees Celsius. Enforces lower temperature boundary for temperature-sensitive materials. Used in conjunction with maximum temperature to define the acceptable storage environment range.
attributes.references: ISO 9001 Quality Management - Environmental Monitoring, SAP WM - Temperature Requirements

attributes.name: x_coordinate
attributes.description: Horizontal X-axis coordinate of the storage location within the warehouse floor plan. Used for warehouse mapping, route optimization, and integration with warehouse automation systems and AGVs. Measured in meters or feet from a defined origin point.
attributes.references: Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Location Coordinates, Warehouse Automation Standards

attributes.name: y_coordinate
attributes.description: Horizontal Y-axis coordinate of the storage location within the warehouse floor plan. Used in conjunction with X coordinate for precise location mapping and automated material handling system navigation.
attributes.references: Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Location Coordinates, Warehouse Automation Standards

attributes.name: z_coordinate
attributes.description: Vertical Z-axis coordinate representing the height of the storage location above the warehouse floor. Critical for automated storage and retrieval systems (AS/RS) and crane operations. Measured in meters or feet.
attributes.references: Warehouse Automation Standards - AS/RS Coordinate Systems

attributes.name: zone_code
attributes.description: High-level zone identifier within the warehouse (e.g., A, B, C or NORTH, SOUTH). Zones group locations by physical area, product category, or operational function to optimize picking routes and material flow.
attributes.references: SAP WM - Storage Section, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM - Zone Management

products.name: warehouse
products.description: Master record for each physical warehouse or storage facility in the manufacturing network. Captures warehouse code, name, address, facility type (raw material, WIP, finished goods, distribution), total capacity, climate control capabilities, and operational status. Serves as the top-level organizational unit for all inventory storage hierarchies and warehouse management operations.
products.reference: SAP WM Warehouse Number / WMS Facility Master

attributes.name: warehouse_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the warehouse facility. Primary key for the warehouse master record.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Warehouses in manufacturing are cost centers absorbing storage, handling, and labor costs. Domain experts expect warehouse.cost_center_id for facility overhead allocation, warehouse cost reporting, an

attributes.name: active_from_date
attributes.description: Date when the warehouse facility became operational and available for inventory storage. Marks the start of the facility lifecycle.

attributes.name: active_to_date
attributes.description: Date when the warehouse facility ceased operations or was decommissioned. Null for currently active facilities. Used for historical reporting and capacity planning.

attributes.name: address_line_1
attributes.description: Primary street address of the warehouse facility. First line of the physical location address.

attributes.name: address_line_2
attributes.description: Secondary address information such as building number, suite, or floor. Optional additional address detail.

attributes.name: automated_storage_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the warehouse uses automated storage and retrieval systems (AS/RS). Impacts throughput rates, labor requirements, and integration with WMS and MES.

attributes.name: city
attributes.description: City or municipality where the warehouse facility is located.

attributes.name: climate_controlled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the warehouse has climate control capabilities for temperature and humidity-sensitive materials. Critical for pharmaceutical, electronic component, and chemical storage compliance.

attributes.name: contact_email
attributes.description: Primary email address for warehouse operational communication. Used for shipment notifications, inventory alerts, and administrative correspondence.

attributes.name: contact_phone
attributes.description: Primary contact phone number for the warehouse facility. Used for carrier coordination, emergency contact, and operational communication.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code identifying the country where the warehouse is located. Used for customs, tax, and regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the warehouse master record was first created in the system. Used for data lineage and audit trail.

attributes.name: customs_bonded_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the warehouse is a customs-bonded facility authorized to store imported goods before duty payment. Critical for international supply chain and duty deferral strategies.

attributes.name: erp_plant_code
attributes.description: ERP system plant code associated with this warehouse. Links warehouse to manufacturing plant in SAP S/4HANA for MRP and production planning integration.

attributes.name: facility_type
attributes.description: Classification of the warehouse based on the primary type of inventory stored. Determines storage requirements, handling procedures, and integration with MRP and MES systems.

attributes.name: fire_suppression_system_type
attributes.description: Type of fire suppression system installed in the warehouse. Critical for insurance, safety compliance, and determining storage eligibility for flammable materials.

attributes.name: hazmat_certified_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the warehouse is certified to store hazardous materials. Determines eligibility for storing chemicals, flammables, and regulated substances per OSHA and EPA requirements.

attributes.name: hazmat_storage_classes
attributes.description: Comma-separated list of hazardous material storage classes the warehouse is certified to handle (e.g., Class 3 Flammable Liquids, Class 8 Corrosives). Based on UN hazard classification system.
attributes.references: UN Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods

attributes.name: iso_14001_certified_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the warehouse facility holds ISO 14001 environmental management system certification. Demonstrates commitment to environmental sustainability and regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: iso_9001_certified_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the warehouse facility holds ISO 9001 quality management system certification. Impacts supplier qualification and customer audit requirements.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when the warehouse master record was last updated. Used for change tracking and data synchronization across systems.

attributes.name: latitude
attributes.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the warehouse facility. Used for logistics optimization, route planning, and TMS integration.

attributes.name: lease_expiration_date
attributes.description: Date when the warehouse lease agreement expires. Null for owned facilities. Used for facility planning and contract renewal management.

attributes.name: longitude
attributes.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the warehouse facility. Used for logistics optimization, route planning, and TMS integration.

attributes.name: number_of_loading_docks
attributes.description: Total count of loading and unloading dock positions. Determines receiving and shipping throughput capacity.

attributes.name: number_of_storage_bins
attributes.description: Total count of discrete storage bin locations within the warehouse. Used for bin location management and inventory tracking granularity in SAP WM.

attributes.name: operating_hours_description
attributes.description: Textual description of standard operating hours and shift patterns (e.g., 24/7, Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, Three-shift operation). Used for carrier scheduling and labor planning.

attributes.name: operational_status
attributes.description: Current operational state of the warehouse facility. Determines availability for inventory allocation and order fulfillment operations.

attributes.name: ownership_type
attributes.description: Classification of warehouse ownership model. Determines financial accounting treatment, CapEx vs OpEx allocation, and operational control level.

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.description: Postal or ZIP code for the warehouse facility address. Used for logistics routing and carrier integration.

attributes.name: record_source_system
attributes.description: Identifier of the source system that created or owns this warehouse master record (e.g., SAP_S4HANA, DYNAMICS_365_SCM, MDM). Used for data lineage and system-of-record identification.

attributes.name: security_level
attributes.description: Classification of physical security measures and access controls at the warehouse. Determines eligibility for storing high-value goods, controlled substances, and export-controlled items.

attributes.name: state_province
attributes.description: State, province, or regional administrative division where the warehouse is located.

attributes.name: storage_area_square_meters
attributes.description: Floor area dedicated to inventory storage in square meters. Excludes receiving docks, shipping areas, and administrative space.

attributes.name: temperature_range_max_celsius
attributes.description: Maximum temperature that can be maintained in climate-controlled zones, measured in Celsius. Used for material storage requirement validation.

attributes.name: temperature_range_min_celsius
attributes.description: Minimum temperature that can be maintained in climate-controlled zones, measured in Celsius. Used for material storage requirement validation.

attributes.name: time_zone
attributes.description: IANA time zone identifier for the warehouse location (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/Berlin). Used for scheduling, shift planning, and cross-facility coordination.

attributes.name: total_capacity_cubic_meters
attributes.description: Total storage capacity of the warehouse measured in cubic meters. Represents maximum volumetric storage capability for inventory planning and capacity utilization analysis.

attributes.name: total_floor_area_square_meters
attributes.description: Total floor area of the warehouse facility in square meters. Includes storage, receiving, shipping, and administrative areas.

attributes.name: usable_capacity_cubic_meters
attributes.description: Actual usable storage capacity after accounting for aisles, equipment, and operational space. Used for realistic inventory allocation and safety stock calculations.

attributes.name: warehouse_code
attributes.description: Externally-known unique alphanumeric code identifying the warehouse facility. Used in SAP WM and Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM for warehouse identification and cross-system integration.

attributes.name: warehouse_name
attributes.description: Full business name of the warehouse facility. Human-readable identifier used in operational documentation and reporting.

attributes.name: wms_system_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the WMS system deployed at this warehouse (e.g., SAP_WM, DYNAMICS_365_SCM, MANHATTAN). Used for system integration routing and data synchronization.

products.name: material_master
products.description: Authoritative master record for every raw material, component, sub-assembly, WIP item, and finished good managed in inventory. Captures SKU code, material description, material type (raw, semi-finished, finished), base unit of measure, weight, dimensions, shelf life, hazardous material classification, planning type, reorder point, safety stock level, ABC classification, and storage conditions. Serves as the single source of truth for material identity and attributes referenced by all inventory transactions, stock balances, and planning processes across the enterprise.

attributes.name: material_master_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the material master record. Primary key for the material master data product.

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: In manufacturing ERP (SAP MM), material master valuation class determines the GL inventory account for all postings. Domain experts expect material_master.gl_account_id for automatic account determina

attributes.name: plant_data_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.plant_data. Business justification: In industrial manufacturing ERP (SAP-style), material_master and plant_data are the general and plant-specific views of the same master data object. Direct FK enables procurement, MRP, and inventory t

attributes.name: profit_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Linking materials to profit centers enables product‑level profitability reporting and budget planning.

attributes.name: project_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to engineering.engineering_project. Business justification: Material masters are created as outputs of NPI (New Product Introduction) engineering projects. Finance and engineering teams track which project originated each material master for project closure re

attributes.name: sku_master_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.sku_master. Business justification: Required for production planning and cost roll‑up reports that map inventory material to the SKU definition used in sales orders and cost accounting.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supplier.supplier. Business justification: Preferred supplier per material is required for MRP planning and procurement contracts; experts expect a default vendor_id on material_master.

attributes.name: abc_indicator
attributes.description: ABC classification for inventory management prioritization. A items are high-value requiring tight control, B items are moderate-value, C items are low-value with relaxed controls. Used for cycle counting frequency and safety stock strategies.
attributes.references: SAP Material Master (MARC-ABCIN), ISO 9001 Quality Management

attributes.name: base_unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Primary unit in which the material is managed in inventory and production. Examples: EA (each), KG (kilogram), L (liter), M (meter). All stock quantities are maintained in this unit.
attributes.references: SAP Material Master (MARA-MEINS), ISO 80000, UN/CEFACT Recommendation 20

attributes.name: batch_management_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether the material requires batch or lot tracking. When active, all inventory transactions must reference a batch number for full traceability and quality control.
attributes.references: SAP Material Master (MARA-XCHPF), ISO 9001, FDA 21 CFR Part 11

attributes.name: created_date
attributes.description: Date when the material master record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and material lifecycle tracking.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO currency code for material valuation. Examples: USD, EUR, GBP. All prices and values are maintained in this currency.

attributes.name: dimension_unit
attributes.description: Unit of measure for length, width, and height dimensions. Examples: MM (millimeter), CM (centimeter), M (meter), IN (inch).

attributes.name: goods_receipt_processing_time_days
attributes.business_glossary_term: Goods Receipt (GR) Processing Time in Days
attributes.description: Time required for quality inspection and goods receipt posting after physical delivery. Added to planned delivery time for total procurement lead time.

attributes.name: gross_weight
attributes.description: Total weight of the material including all packaging. Used for logistics planning, freight calculation, and warehouse capacity management.

attributes.name: hazard_class
attributes.description: Classification of hazardous material type per UN/DOT regulations. Examples: flammable liquid, corrosive, toxic, oxidizer. Determines packaging, labeling, and shipping requirements.
attributes.references: SAP Material Master (MARC-HAZMAT), UN Recommendations on Transport of Dangerous Goods, 49 CFR

attributes.name: hazardous_material_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether the material is classified as hazardous. Triggers additional safety, handling, storage, and transportation requirements per OSHA and EPA regulations.
attributes.references: SAP Material Master (MARA-HAZMAT), OSHA 29 CFR 1910.1200, EPA RCRA

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Height dimension of the material. Used for storage bin assignment, handling equipment selection, and transportation planning.

attributes.name: inspection_setup_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether incoming goods require quality inspection before stock placement. Triggers QM (Quality Management) inspection lot creation at goods receipt.
attributes.references: SAP Material Master (MARC-QMATV), ISO 9001, PPAP (Production Part Approval Process)

attributes.name: last_modified_by
attributes.business_glossary_term: Material Master Last Modified By User
attributes.description: User ID of the person who last modified the material master record. Used for audit trail and data governance.

attributes.name: last_modified_date
attributes.description: Date when the material master record was last changed. Used for audit trail and change management tracking.

attributes.name: length
attributes.description: Length dimension of the material. Used for storage bin assignment, handling equipment selection, and transportation planning.

attributes.name: lot_size
attributes.description: Lot-sizing procedure code determining how procurement or production quantities are calculated. Examples: EX (exact order quantity), FX (fixed lot size), HB (lot-for-lot).

attributes.name: manufacturer_name
attributes.description: Name of the original manufacturer or OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) of the material. Used for quality tracking, warranty claims, and supplier management.

attributes.name: manufacturer_part_number
attributes.description: Original part number assigned by the manufacturer or OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer). Used for cross-referencing, procurement, and technical documentation.

attributes.name: material_description
attributes.description: Full textual description of the material including key characteristics, specifications, and usage. Used for identification and communication across procurement, production, and sales.

attributes.name: material_group
attributes.description: Hierarchical classification code grouping materials with similar characteristics for procurement, planning, and reporting purposes. Used in MRP (Material Requirements Planning) and purchasing strategies.

attributes.name: material_number
attributes.description: Unique business identifier for the material assigned by the enterprise. This is the externally-known SKU (Stock Keeping Unit) code used across all systems and documentation.

attributes.name: material_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the material master record. Controls whether the material can be procured, produced, or sold. Blocked materials cannot be used in new transactions.

attributes.name: material_type
attributes.description: Classification of the material based on its role in the manufacturing and supply chain process. Determines procurement, production, and inventory management rules. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: raw_material|semi_finished|finished_good|trading_good|spare_part|consumable|packaging_material|service — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: maximum_lot_size
attributes.description: Maximum quantity that can be ordered or produced in a single transaction. Constrained by storage capacity, shelf life, or supplier limitations.

attributes.name: minimum_lot_size
attributes.description: Minimum quantity that must be ordered or produced in a single transaction. Driven by supplier MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity) or production setup constraints.

attributes.name: minimum_remaining_shelf_life_days
attributes.business_glossary_term: Minimum Remaining Shelf Life in Days
attributes.description: Minimum remaining shelf life required at goods receipt. Materials with less remaining shelf life are rejected. Ensures adequate usable life for production and customer delivery.

attributes.name: moving_average_price
attributes.description: Weighted average cost per base unit of measure, recalculated with each goods receipt. Used when price control is set to moving average price.

attributes.name: mrp_type
attributes.description: MRP procedure code controlling how the material is planned. Determines reorder point planning, forecast-based planning, or time-phased planning methods.

attributes.name: net_weight
attributes.description: Weight of the material itself excluding packaging. Used for production planning, yield calculations, and material consumption tracking.

attributes.name: planned_delivery_time_days
attributes.description: Expected lead time in days from order placement to goods receipt. Used by MRP to calculate order release dates. Includes supplier lead time and internal processing time.

attributes.name: price_control_indicator
attributes.description: Defines material valuation method. S = standard price (fixed cost), V = moving average price (recalculated with each goods receipt). Determines inventory valuation approach.
attributes.references: SAP Material Master (MBEW-VPRSV), IFRS IAS 2, GAAP ASC 330

attributes.name: price_unit
attributes.description: Quantity unit for which the price is maintained. Example: if price is $100 per 1000 units, price unit is 1000. Allows fractional pricing for low-cost materials.

attributes.name: procurement_type
attributes.description: Defines whether the material is manufactured internally, purchased externally, or both. Controls MRP (Material Requirements Planning) logic and sourcing decisions.

attributes.name: product_hierarchy
attributes.description: Multi-level classification structure organizing materials into product families and categories. Used for sales reporting, forecasting, and product portfolio management.

attributes.name: reorder_point
attributes.description: Inventory level that triggers automatic replenishment. When stock falls below this level, MRP generates procurement proposals. Critical for JIT (Just In Time) inventory control.

attributes.name: safety_stock
attributes.description: Minimum inventory buffer maintained to protect against demand variability and supply disruptions. Never falls below this level under normal planning. Used in safety stock optimization algorithms.

attributes.name: serial_number_profile
attributes.description: Configuration code defining serial number management requirements. Determines whether material requires unique serial number tracking for traceability, warranty, and asset management.

attributes.name: shelf_life_expiration_days
attributes.business_glossary_term: Shelf Life Expiration Period in Days
attributes.description: Total shelf life of the material from production or goods receipt date. After this period, material expires and cannot be used. Critical for perishable materials and chemicals.

attributes.name: standard_price
attributes.description: Fixed valuation price per base unit of measure. Used when price control is set to standard price. Updated periodically through cost accounting processes.

attributes.name: storage_conditions
attributes.description: Required environmental conditions for material storage. Examples: temperature range, humidity control, light protection, hazardous material segregation. Used for warehouse bin assignment and handling instructions.
attributes.references: SAP Material Master (MARA-RAUBE), ISO 9001, OSHA Storage Requirements

attributes.name: temperature_conditions
attributes.description: Specific temperature range requirements for storage and transportation. Examples: ambient, refrigerated (2-8°C), frozen (-20°C), controlled room temperature (15-25°C).

attributes.name: valuation_class
attributes.description: Accounting classification code linking material to general ledger accounts. Determines which GL (General Ledger) accounts are posted for inventory movements and consumption.
attributes.references: SAP Material Master (MBEW-BKLAS), IFRS/GAAP Inventory Accounting

attributes.name: volume
attributes.description: Physical volume occupied by the material. Used for warehouse space planning, container loading optimization, and transportation planning.

attributes.name: volume_unit
attributes.description: Unit of measure for volume field. Examples: L (liter), M3 (cubic meter), GAL (gallon).

attributes.name: weight_unit
attributes.description: Unit of measure for gross and net weight fields. Examples: KG (kilogram), LB (pound), TON (metric ton).

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Width dimension of the material. Used for storage bin assignment, handling equipment selection, and transportation planning.

attributes.name: created_by
attributes.description: User ID of the person who created the material master record. Used for audit trail and data governance.

products.name: stock_balance
products.description: Current and period-end stock balance record capturing on-hand quantity by stock category (unrestricted, quality inspection, blocked, in-transit, reserved) for each material at each storage location. Tracks valuation price, total stock value, last physical count date, and last movement date. Serves as the single source of truth for real-time stock position used by material planning, available-to-promise calculations, and inventory reporting across all facilities.

attributes.name: stock_balance_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the stock balance record. Primary key for the stock balance entity.

attributes.name: account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.customer_account. Business justification: Customer‑owned stock balances (e.g., VMI) need a FK to the customer account for reporting on on‑hand quantities per customer.

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Cost‑center accounting of on‑hand inventory supports internal cost reporting and variance analysis per production site.

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Inventory balance sheet reporting in manufacturing requires stock balances to be mapped to GL inventory accounts. This FK enables period-end inventory valuation reconciliation between WMS stock quanti

attributes.name: inspection_lot_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_lot. Business justification: Stock balance includes inspection status; linking to the specific inspection lot enables detailed traceability for quality release decisions.

attributes.name: lot_batch_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.lot_batch. Business justification: stock_balance tracks on-hand quantities at the batch level and carries a batch_number STRING column. The lot_batch table is the authoritative master for batch data including expiry dates, quality deci

attributes.name: material_master_id
attributes.description: Reference to the material master record for which this stock balance is maintained. Links to the material product in the Product Engineering domain.

attributes.name: mrp_run_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supply.mrp_run. Business justification: INVENTORY RECONCILIATION: each stock balance snapshot is associated with the MRP run that calculated it.

attributes.name: plant_data_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to product.plant_data. Business justification: MRP evaluation and replenishment reporting require stock_balance to be assessed against plant_data parameters (safety_stock_quantity, reorder_point, mrp_type). Industrial manufacturing planners run st

attributes.name: stock_location_id
attributes.description: Reference to the specific storage location within the plant where the material is stored. Links to storage location master data.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Storage Location Master

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supplier.supplier. Business justification: Consignment stock ownership must be tracked; vendor_id links stock_balance to the supplying vendor for liability and reporting.

attributes.name: abc_classification
attributes.description: ABC analysis classification based on material value and consumption. A items are high-value/high-usage requiring tight control; B items are moderate; C items are low-value/low-usage with relaxed control.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM ABC Analysis; ISO 9001 Quality Management

attributes.name: available_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity available for new orders or production, calculated as unrestricted quantity on hand minus reserved quantity. Used for Available-to-Promise (ATP) calculations.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM ATP; MRP - Material Requirements Planning

attributes.name: blocked_reason_code
attributes.description: Code indicating the reason why stock is blocked from use. Examples include quality hold, pending investigation, customer return, damaged goods, regulatory hold. Null if stock is not blocked.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Stock Management; ISO 9001; CAPA - Corrective and Preventive Action

attributes.name: consignment_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this stock is consignment stock owned by the supplier but held at the customer location. True for consignment stock; false for own stock.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Consignment; IFRS IAS 2

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this stock balance record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 Timestamp Format; SOX Compliance; GDPR Article 5

attributes.name: expiration_date
attributes.description: Date after which the material should not be used due to shelf life limitations. Applicable for perishable materials, chemicals, and time-sensitive components. Null for non-expiring materials.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Batch Management; ISO 22000 Food Safety; FDA 21 CFR Part 11

attributes.name: inventory_turnover_days
attributes.description: Average number of days this material remains in stock before being consumed or sold. Calculated as (quantity on hand / average daily usage). Used for inventory performance KPI tracking.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Inventory Analysis; APICS Supply Chain Management

attributes.name: last_count_variance_quantity
attributes.description: Difference between book quantity and physical count quantity from the last inventory count. Positive values indicate surplus; negative values indicate shortage.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Physical Inventory; ISO 9001

attributes.name: last_goods_issue_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent goods issue transaction that decreased stock for this material at this location. Used for inventory turnover analysis.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Goods Issue; ISO 8601 Date Format

attributes.name: last_goods_receipt_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent goods receipt transaction that increased stock for this material at this location. Used for inventory aging analysis.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Goods Receipt; ISO 8601 Date Format

attributes.name: last_physical_count_date
attributes.description: Date of the most recent physical inventory count or cycle count performed for this material at this location. Used to track count frequency and compliance.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Physical Inventory; ISO 9001 Quality Management; SOX Compliance

attributes.name: last_updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this stock balance record was last modified. Updated with each stock movement transaction. Used for change tracking and data freshness monitoring.
attributes.references: ISO 8601 Timestamp Format; SOX Compliance; GDPR Article 5

attributes.name: manufacture_date
attributes.description: Date when the material or batch was manufactured or produced. Used for traceability and shelf life calculations. Applicable for batch-managed materials.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Batch Management; ISO 9001; PPAP - Production Part Approval Process

attributes.name: maximum_stock_level
attributes.description: Upper limit for stock quantity to prevent overstocking and excess inventory carrying costs. Used in inventory optimization and replenishment planning.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM MRP; Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM Inventory Optimization

attributes.name: obsolete_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this material is classified as obsolete and should be phased out or written off. True if material is no longer used in production or sales.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Material Master; IFRS IAS 2 - Inventories

attributes.name: period_end_snapshot_date
attributes.description: Date representing the period-end for which this stock balance snapshot was captured. Used for month-end, quarter-end, and year-end inventory reporting and financial close processes.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-CO Period Close; IFRS; GAAP; SOX Compliance

attributes.name: quantity_on_hand
attributes.description: Current physical quantity of material available in this storage location and stock category. Measured in the materials base unit of measure.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Stock Overview; ISO 11179

attributes.name: reorder_point
attributes.description: Stock level at which a replenishment order should be triggered. Calculated based on lead time demand and safety stock requirements.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM MRP; MRP - Material Requirements Planning

attributes.name: reserved_quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of material reserved for specific sales orders, production orders, or other commitments. Reduces available-to-promise quantity.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Reservation; MRP II - Manufacturing Resource Planning

attributes.name: safety_stock_quantity
attributes.description: Minimum stock level maintained as buffer against demand variability and supply disruptions. Used in MRP calculations and reorder point determination.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM MRP; JIT - Just In Time; ISO 9001

attributes.name: slow_moving_indicator
attributes.description: Flag indicating whether this material is classified as slow-moving based on consumption patterns. True if no movement in the defined threshold period (e.g., 90 days).
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Inventory Analysis; Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM

attributes.name: source_system
attributes.description: Identifier of the operational system from which this stock balance record originated. Examples include SAP S/4HANA MM, Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM, or legacy WMS systems.
attributes.references: Informatica MDM Master Data Management; ISO 8000 Data Quality

attributes.name: source_system_key
attributes.description: Natural key or unique identifier from the source operational system. Used for data lineage, reconciliation, and troubleshooting integration issues.
attributes.references: Informatica MDM; ISO 8000 Data Quality; Data Governance Framework

attributes.name: special_stock_type
attributes.description: Classification of special stock scenarios. Standard is regular stock; consignment is supplier-owned; project stock is allocated to specific projects; sales order stock is customer-specific; subcontracting is at vendor location; returnable packaging is reusable containers.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Special Stock; ISO 9001

attributes.name: stock_category
attributes.description: Classification of stock availability status. Unrestricted stock is available for use; quality inspection stock is pending QA approval; blocked stock cannot be used; in-transit stock is moving between locations; reserved stock is allocated to specific orders or production.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Stock Category; ISO 9001 Quality Management

attributes.name: stock_status
attributes.description: Overall status of the stock balance record. Active indicates normal operations; frozen indicates temporary hold; blocked indicates quality or compliance issues; pending disposal indicates scheduled for write-off or scrap.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Stock Management; ISO 9001

attributes.name: stock_type
attributes.description: Classification of material by its role in the production process. Raw material is input to production; WIP is work in progress; finished goods are ready for sale; semi-finished are intermediate products; spare parts support maintenance; packaging materials; MRO is maintenance, repair, and operations supplies. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: raw_material|wip|finished_goods|semi_finished|spare_parts|packaging|mro — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Material Type; MES - Manufacturing Execution System; BOM - Bill of Materials

attributes.name: total_stock_value
attributes.description: Total financial value of the stock on hand, calculated as quantity on hand multiplied by valuation price. Used for inventory valuation reporting and balance sheet preparation.
attributes.references: IFRS IAS 2 - Inventories; GAAP ASC 330; SAP S/4HANA FI-CO

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: Base unit of measure for the quantity on hand. Examples include EA (each), KG (kilogram), L (liter), M (meter), etc.
attributes.references: ISO 80000 - Quantities and Units; UN/CEFACT Recommendation 20

attributes.name: valuation_class
attributes.description: Financial accounting classification used to determine the general ledger accounts for inventory postings. Links material movements to specific GL accounts for financial reporting.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA FI-CO Valuation Class; IFRS IAS 2; GAAP ASC 330

attributes.name: valuation_currency
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the valuation price. Typically the plant or company code currency.

attributes.name: valuation_price
attributes.description: Standard or moving average price used to value the stock for financial reporting. Price per base unit of measure.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Material Valuation; IFRS IAS 2 - Inventories; GAAP ASC 330

attributes.name: vendor_batch_number
attributes.description: Batch or lot number assigned by the supplier for purchased materials. Used for supplier traceability and quality issue resolution.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Batch Management; ISO 9001; APQP - Advanced Product Quality Planning

products.name: lot_batch
products.description: Lot and batch master record for materials subject to batch management, capturing batch number, material reference, manufacturing date, expiry date, shelf life expiration date (SLED), batch status (unrestricted, restricted, blocked), origin plant, supplier batch number, and quality inspection results. Supports full lot traceability from raw material receipt through production and customer shipment per ISO 9001 and PPAP requirements.

attributes.name: lot_batch_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the lot or batch record. Primary key for lot and batch master data tracking.

attributes.name: account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.customer_account. Business justification: Regulated batch tracking often requires associating a batch with the specific customer that ordered it.

attributes.name: account_site_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.account_site. Business justification: In VMI and consignment programs, lot/batches are held at specific customer manufacturing sites. Quality recall traceability, consignment stock reconciliation, and site-level batch reporting require li

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Batch costing in manufacturing (batch_cost_amount on lot_batch) must be attributed to a cost center for product cost analysis and variance reporting. Domain experts expect lot_batch.cost_center_id for

attributes.name: engineering_revision_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to engineering.engineering_revision. Business justification: Every production lot is manufactured to a specific engineering revision — a core traceability requirement under IATF 16949, AS9100, and FDA 21 CFR Part 11. Non-conformance investigations, field return

attributes.name: material_master_id
attributes.description: Reference to the material master record that this lot or batch belongs to. Links to the material product for which batch management is enabled.

attributes.name: order_intake_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to sales.order_intake. Business justification: In make-to-order industrial manufacturing, a production lot/batch is created specifically for a customer order intake. Quality and regulatory traceability reports require linking the produced batch ba

attributes.name: procurement_goods_receipt_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supplier.procurement_goods_receipt. Business justification: Lot/batch records created via supplier goods receipt must trace to the specific procurement_goods_receipt. Essential for batch traceability, product recall management, and quality investigations — ind

attributes.name: production_line_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to production.production_line. Business justification: Lot traceability in industrial manufacturing requires knowing which production line produced a batch — critical for quality investigations, regulatory audits, and line-level defect rate analysis. This

attributes.name: production_work_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the production order under which this batch was manufactured. Links batch to specific manufacturing execution records for full production traceability.

attributes.name: purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Reference to the purchase order under which this batch was procured from an external supplier. Applicable only to purchased materials and components.

attributes.name: stock_location_id
attributes.description: Reference to the primary storage location or warehouse where this batch is currently stored. Supports location-based inventory tracking and warehouse management.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Reference to the supplier or vendor who provided this batch for purchased materials. Null for internally manufactured batches. Supports supplier quality tracking and traceability.

attributes.name: vendor_site_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supplier.site. Business justification: Knowing which specific supplier manufacturing site produced a batch is required for quality investigations, product recalls, and supplier site performance analysis. lot_batch has supplier_id but not s

attributes.name: available_quantity
attributes.description: The current unrestricted quantity of this batch available for use in production or shipment. Updated in real-time based on goods movements, consumption, and quality status changes.

attributes.name: batch_classification
attributes.description: The material type classification for this batch indicating its stage in the production process. Used for inventory segmentation and MRP planning logic.

attributes.name: batch_cost_amount
attributes.description: The total production or procurement cost for this batch in the company currency. Used for inventory valuation, cost of goods sold calculation, and financial reporting per IFRS/GAAP standards.

attributes.name: batch_notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for capturing additional information, special handling instructions, quality observations, or deviation notes specific to this batch. Used by production, quality, and warehouse personnel.

attributes.name: batch_number
attributes.description: The unique alphanumeric identifier assigned to this specific lot or batch. This is the externally-known business identifier used across procurement, production, quality, and shipment processes.

attributes.name: batch_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the batch indicating its usability. Unrestricted: available for use; Quality Inspection: under QA review; Restricted: limited use with approval; Blocked: not available for use due to quality or compliance issues.

attributes.name: blocked_quantity
attributes.description: The quantity of this batch that is blocked and not available for any use. Set when batch fails quality inspection or is subject to hold for investigation per CAPA or NCR processes.

attributes.name: created_by_user
attributes.description: The user ID or username of the person who created this batch record. Audit field for accountability and data governance.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this batch record was first created in the system. Audit field for data lineage and record lifecycle tracking.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the batch cost amount. Typically the company code currency for manufactured batches or purchase order currency for procured batches.

attributes.name: customer_batch_required_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this batch must be tracked and reported to customers on shipping documents and certificates of analysis. True when customer contracts require batch-level traceability.

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: The date after which the batch should not be used due to degradation, safety, or regulatory constraints. Applicable to materials with limited shelf life such as chemicals, adhesives, and perishable components.

attributes.name: goods_receipt_date
attributes.description: The date when this batch was received into inventory via goods receipt posting. Marks the start of inventory availability and shelf life tracking for purchased materials.

attributes.name: hazardous_material_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this batch contains hazardous materials requiring special handling, storage, and transportation per OSHA and EPA regulations. True for materials classified as dangerous goods.

attributes.name: last_goods_movement_date
attributes.description: The date of the most recent goods movement transaction for this batch (receipt, issue, transfer, or adjustment). Used for inventory aging analysis and slow-moving stock identification.

attributes.name: last_modified_by_user
attributes.description: The user ID or username of the person who last modified this batch record. Audit field for accountability and change management.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this batch record was last updated. Audit field for change tracking and data quality monitoring.

attributes.name: manufacturing_date
attributes.description: The date on which this batch was produced or manufactured. Critical for shelf life calculation, expiry determination, and lot traceability per ISO 9001 and PPAP requirements.

attributes.name: origin_country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code indicating the country of origin for this batch. Required for customs, trade compliance, and country-of-origin labeling.

attributes.name: quality_certificate_number
attributes.description: The certificate number or document identifier for the quality certificate issued for this batch. Required for customer shipments and regulatory compliance documentation.

attributes.name: quality_decision
attributes.description: The final quality decision for this batch based on inspection results. Accepted: meets all specifications; Rejected: fails quality criteria; Conditional: accepted with restrictions; Pending: awaiting inspection completion.

attributes.name: quantity_produced
attributes.description: The total quantity of material produced in this batch, expressed in the base unit of measure for the material. Used for inventory valuation and yield analysis.

attributes.name: restricted_quantity
attributes.description: The quantity of this batch that is restricted and requires special approval for use. Typically set during quality inspection or when quality issues are identified.

attributes.name: shelf_life_expiration_date
attributes.description: The calculated shelf life expiration date based on manufacturing date and material-specific shelf life duration. Used in SAP MM for automatic batch determination and FEFO (First Expired First Out) logic.

attributes.name: special_stock_indicator
attributes.description: Indicator for special stock types such as consignment stock, project stock, or customer stock. Used for specialized inventory management scenarios and ownership tracking.

attributes.name: supplier_batch_number
attributes.description: The batch or lot number assigned by the supplier or vendor for raw materials and purchased components. Used for upstream traceability and supplier quality management.

attributes.name: unit_of_measure
attributes.description: The unit of measure for the quantity produced (e.g., KG for kilograms, EA for each, L for liters, M for meters). Aligns with material master UOM configuration.

attributes.name: valuation_type
attributes.description: The valuation type or split valuation indicator for this batch when multiple valuations exist for the same material (e.g., domestic vs. imported, new vs. refurbished). Used for financial accounting and cost segregation.

products.name: stock_movement
products.description: Transactional record of every inventory movement event including goods receipts, goods issues, stock transfers, internal transfers between bins, returns, adjustments, write-offs, and scrapping. Captures movement type code, quantity, unit of measure, source and destination storage locations, plant, cost center, reference document (purchase order, production order, delivery, cost center), posting date, movement reason code, picker/operator assignment, and confirmation status. Serves as the single source of truth for all inventory transaction activity, supporting stock balance updates, audit trails, and material document history across all facilities.
products.reference: SAP MM Material Document (MSEG/MKPF) / Goods Movement

attributes.name: stock_movement_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for each stock movement transaction. Primary key for the stock movement data product.

attributes.name: account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the customer when this movement is a goods issue for sales delivery or a return from customer.

attributes.name: asset_work_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to asset.asset_work_order. Business justification: Maintenance material consumption tracking: goods issues (stock movements) for spare parts and consumables must reference the maintenance work order that triggered them. This supports actual vs. planne

attributes.name: cost_center_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Each inventory movement is charged to a cost center for activity‑based costing; the FK enables accurate cost allocation in the general ledger.

attributes.name: delivery_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the outbound delivery document when this movement is part of a shipment to customer.

attributes.name: gl_account_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Every goods movement (goods issue, goods receipt, transfer) in manufacturing generates a financial posting to a GL account for inventory valuation. Domain experts expect this FK for FI-MM reconciliati

attributes.name: header_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the sales order when this movement is a goods issue for customer delivery.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA SD Sales and Distribution

attributes.name: inspection_lot_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.inspection_lot. Business justification: Goods movements that trigger inspections must reference the inspection lot to associate movement data with inspection outcomes, used in compliance reporting.

attributes.name: lot_batch_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.lot_batch. Business justification: stock_movement carries a batch_number STRING column that is a denormalized reference to the lot_batch master. Every batch-managed stock movement (goods receipt, goods issue, transfer) is tied to a spe

attributes.name: material_master_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the material master record representing the SKU, raw material, WIP component, or finished good that was moved.

attributes.name: procurement_goods_receipt_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to supplier.procurement_goods_receipt. Business justification: Goods receipt stock movements (movement_type GR) must reference the procurement_goods_receipt document that triggered them. Required for 3-way match reconciliation, GR/IR clearing, and inventory audit

attributes.name: purchase_order_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the purchase order when this movement is a goods receipt from procurement.

attributes.name: serialized_unit_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.serialized_unit. Business justification: stock_movement has a serial_number STRING column for movements of serialized items (goods receipt, goods issue, transfer of a specific serialized unit). The serialized_unit table is the authoritative

attributes.name: source_stock_location_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to inventory.stock_location. Business justification: Link stock movement to its source location for traceability; replace free‑text code with FK.

attributes.name: supplier_id
attributes.description: Foreign key reference to the supplier when this movement is a goods receipt from external procurement.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this stock movement record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: destination_bin_location
attributes.description: Specific bin, shelf, or warehouse location identifier to which the material was placed or moved.

attributes.name: destination_storage_location_code
attributes.description: For transfer movements, the receiving storage location to which the material was moved.

attributes.name: document_date
attributes.description: The date on the source document (e.g., delivery note, production confirmation) that triggered this stock movement. May differ from posting date due to processing delays.

attributes.name: entry_timestamp
attributes.description: The precise date and time when this stock movement record was created in the system, capturing the moment of transaction entry.

attributes.name: goods_issue_indicator
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this movement decreases inventory (goods issue scenario).
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Goods Issue Processing

attributes.name: goods_receipt_indicator
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this movement increases inventory (goods receipt scenario).
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Goods Receipt Processing

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this stock movement record was last updated, supporting change tracking and audit trail requirements.

attributes.name: material_document_item
attributes.description: Line item number within the material document, representing the sequence of this movement within a multi-line transaction.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Material Document Structure

attributes.name: material_document_number
attributes.description: The externally-known SAP material document number that uniquely identifies this inventory movement transaction in the ERP system. This is the business identifier used for audit trails and cross-system reconciliation.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Material Document Structure

attributes.name: material_document_year
attributes.description: Fiscal year of the material document posting, used in combination with material document number for unique identification in SAP systems.
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Material Document Structure

attributes.name: movement_indicator
attributes.description: High-level classification of the movement direction: receipt (inbound), issue (outbound), transfer (location-to-location), or adjustment (correction/write-off).

attributes.name: movement_reason_code
attributes.description: Code explaining the business reason for the movement (e.g., damaged goods, quality defect, process scrap, customer return, inventory correction). Used for root cause analysis and continuous improvement.

attributes.name: movement_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the stock movement transaction: posted (completed and effective), pending (awaiting confirmation), cancelled (voided before posting), or reversed (corrected after posting).
attributes.references: SAP S/4HANA MM Document Status Management

attributes.name: movement_type_code
